title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.1872 - Board of directors, members
text:
67.1872.  Board of directors, members. — A district created pursuant to sections 67.1860 to 67.1898 shall be governed by a board of directors consisting of five members to be elected as provided in section 67.1874.
(L. 2001 H.B. 80 merged with S.B. 224) 
Effective 5-16-01 (S.B. 224); 7-02-01 (H.B. 80)
